mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 'A' AS userSe FROM CMS_USER_ADMIN UNION ALL SELECT 'E' AS userSe FROM CMS_USER_TASK UNION ALL SELECT 'G' AS userSe FROM CMS_USER )
AND userSe = #{userSe}

SELECT USER_ID AS id , 'A' AS userSe , USER_NM AS userNm , EML AS eml , MTELNO AS mtelno , GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , TELNO AS telno , ADDR AS addr , DADDR AS daddr , ADM_STS_SE AS stsSe , AUTH_EXP_YMD AS authExpYmd , AUTH_GRNT_YMD AS authGrntYmd , AUTH_RVK_SE AS authRvkSe , CI AS ci , DI AS di FROM CMS_USER_ADMIN WHERE USER_ID = #{id}

SELECT USER_ID AS id , 'E' AS userSe , USER_NM AS userNm , EML AS eml , MTELNO AS mtelno , GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , TELNO AS telno , ADDR AS addr , DADDR AS daddr , USER_STS_SE AS stsSe , AUTH_EXP_YMD AS authExpYmd , AUTH_GRNT_YMD AS authGrntYmd , AUTH_RVK_SE AS authRvkSe , CI AS ci , DI AS di FROM CMS_USER_TASK WHERE USER_ID = #{id}

SELECT USER_ID AS id , 'G' AS userSe , USER_NM AS userNm , EML AS eml , MTELNO AS mtelno , GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , TELNO AS telno , ADDR AS addr , DADDR AS daddr , ZIP AS zip , USER_STS_SE AS stsSe , CI AS ci , DI AS di FROM CMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMS_USER_ADMIN ( USER_ID , USER_NM , EML , MTELNO , GNDR_SE , TELNO , ADDR , DADDR , ADM_STS_SE , CRT_AT , CRT_BY , CRT_IP , CRT_PGM , UPD_AT , UPD_BY , UPD_IP , UPD_PGM ) VALUES ( #{userId} , #{userNm} , #{eml} , #{mtelno} , #{gndrSe} , #{telno} , #{addr} , #{daddr} , #{admStsSe} , SYSDATE , 'SYSTEM' , 'SYSTEM' , 'ManageService' , SYSDATE , 'SYSTEM' , 'SYSTEM' , 'ManageService' )

INSERT INTO CMS_USER_TASK ( USER_ID , USER_NM , GNDR_SE , MTELNO , EML , TELNO , ADDR , DADDR , USER_STS_SE , CRT_AT , CRT_BY , CRT_IP , CRT_PGM , UPD_AT , UPD_BY , UPD_IP , UPD_PGM ) VALUES ( #{userId} , #{userNm} , #{gndrSe} , #{mtelno} , #{eml} , #{telno} , #{addr} , #{daddr} , #{userStsSe} , SYSDATE , 'SYSTEM' , 'SYSTEM' , 'ManageService' , SYSDATE , 'SYSTEM' , 'SYSTEM' , 'ManageService' )

INSERT INTO CMS_PWD ( USER_ID , USER_SE , PWD , USE_YN , CRT_AT , CRT_BY , CRT_IP , CRT_PGM , UPD_AT , UPD_BY , UPD_IP , UPD_PGM ) VALUES ( #{userId} , #{userSe} , #{pwd} , #{useYn} , SYSDATE , 'SYSTEM' , 'SYSTEM' , 'ManageService' , SYSDATE , 'SYSTEM' , 'SYSTEM' , 'ManageService' )
